common.madeWithLove: Made with love, served with tradition
common.heroSubtitle: Authentic recipes from Palestinian and Lebanese kitchens
common.heroDescription: Journey through generations of culinary wisdom, where every recipe tells a story of family, tradition, and the warmth of home cooking.
common.everyMealMemory: Where Every Meal is a Memory
common.footerDescription: Preserving the authentic flavors of Palestinian and Lebanese kitchens, one recipe at a time. Made with love, tradition, and generations of wisdom.

home.heritageText1: Welcome to our digital kitchen, where the aromatic spices of the Levant meet the warmth of family tradition. These recipes have traveled through generations, from the hills of Lebanon to the olive groves of Palestine.
home.heritageText2: Here, food is more than sustenance—it's a language of love, a bridge between past and present, and an invitation to gather around the table together.
home.service1Desc: Learn traditional techniques hands-on with our family.
home.service2Desc: Custom recipes crafted for your special occasions.
home.service3Desc: Expert guidance on Levantine cuisine and ingredients.
home.subscribeDesc: Subscribe to receive new recipes, cooking tips, and stories from our kitchen delivered straight to your inbox.

recipes.heroDesc: Explore authentic Palestinian and Lebanese recipes, each one a treasured family tradition made with love.
recipes.noRecipesDesc: We couldn't find any recipes matching your current filters. Try adjusting your search or clearing filters.

blog.heroDesc: Discover the stories behind our recipes, cooking techniques, and the rich cultural heritage of Palestinian and Lebanese cuisine.
blog.subscribeDesc: Subscribe to receive new blog posts, recipes, and cooking tips delivered straight to your inbox.

news.heroDesc: Stay updated with cultural events, seasonal cooking traditions, and announcements from our kitchen.

about.heritageDesc: Three generations of culinary wisdom, passed down through handwritten notes, kitchen observations, and the sacred act of cooking together.
about.motherTitle: From My Mother's Kitchen to Yours
about.storyP1: It all began in a small kitchen in Akka, where my grandmother would wake before dawn to prepare the day's meals. Her hands, weathered by years of kneading dough and chopping herbs, moved with a grace that could only come from decades of practice.
about.storyP2: She never wrote down her recipes. They lived in her memory, in the way she judged seasoning by taste, the way she knew a dish was ready by its color and aroma. When my mother inherited the kitchen, she carried these invisible recipes in her heart.
about.storyP3: Now, as the keeper of these traditions, I've made it my mission to document every technique, every secret tip, every story that makes our food more than just sustenance. These recipes are love letters to our homeland, to our ancestors, to the simple act of nourishing those we cherish.
about.quote: The kitchen is where we remember who we are, where we came from, and all those who cooked before us.
about.culturalDesc: In Palestinian and Lebanese culture, food is the language of hospitality, celebration, and memory.
about.actsOfLoveDesc: Every stuffed grape leaf rolled by hand, every kibbeh shaped with care, is an act of love. We cook for hours because our guests are worth every minute.
about.gatheringTogetherDesc: The table is where families reconnect, where stories are shared, where generations sit side by side. Our recipes are designed for sharing.
about.honoringLandDesc: From olive groves to herb gardens, our cuisine celebrates the bounty of the Levantine land. Fresh, seasonal ingredients are our foundation.
about.authenticityDesc: Recipes passed down exactly as we learned them
about.communityDesc: Food brings people together across all divides
about.traditionDesc: Honoring the past while cooking for the future
about.timeline1Desc: Sitti Em Hsein begins preserving family recipes in Akka.
about.timeline2Desc: Mama Montaha began cooking alongside her mother, absorbing every technique and secret tip.
about.timeline3Desc: Moving to a new country, food became even more precious—a connection to homeland across the miles.
about.timeline4Desc: Now we share these recipes with you, hoping to keep our traditions alive for generations to come.

servicesPage.heroTitle: Share the Joy of Heritage Cooking
servicesPage.heroDesc: Beyond sharing recipes, we offer experiences designed to connect you with the rich culinary traditions of the Levant.
servicesPage.experienceDesc: Our sessions and services are more than just instruction—they are cultural narratives shared through the medium of food.
servicesPage.authenticLearningDesc: Learn through observation and feel, just as we did.
servicesPage.traditionalToolsDesc: Work with genuine Levantine kitchen tools and ingredients.
servicesPage.storiesIncludedDesc: Every dish comes with its history and family anecdotes.
servicesPage.ctaTitle: Bring the Flavors of Home to Your Next Occasion
servicesPage.service1Desc: Hands-on intimate cooking sessions where we share the secrets behind classic Palestinian and Lebanese dishes. Perfect for small groups, families, or team building.
servicesPage.service2Desc: Looking to add authentic Levantine flavors to your menu or product? We offer professional recipe development and testing services tailored to your needs.
servicesPage.service3Desc: Bring the authentic taste of home to your next gathering. We specialize in intimate home dinners and small events focusing on mezze and traditional main courses.

chat.title: Ask Mom
chat.welcome: Habibi, welcome back to my kitchen! I am Mama Montaha. What would you like to cook today? I can help you with recipes, ingredients, or even tell you a story about our traditional dishes.
chat.error: My dear, I'm having a bit of trouble in the kitchen right now. Can you try again?
chat.quote: Cooking is an act of love, my dear.

contact.heroTitle: We'd Love to Hear From You
contact.heroSubtitle: Whether you have a question, want to share your cooking story, or need help with a recipe - we're here for you.
contact.momQuote: Every message we receive is like a warm conversation over a cup of Arabic coffee. We read each one carefully and respond with the same care we put into our recipes.
contact.formSuccess: Your message has been sent. We'll get back to you soon!
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us what's on your mind...
contact.faqSubtitle: Check out our most frequently asked questions about cooking techniques, ingredients, and our services.
contact.faq1: Where can I find authentic ingredients?
contact.faq2: Do you ship your cookbook internationally?
contact.faq3: How do I book a cooking class?
